criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of AI-powered functionalities offered by the app, such as automatic enhancements, style transfers, and object recognition.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall usability and intuitiveness of the app's interface and workflow.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed and efficiency of the app in processing images and videos, especially when applying AI features.
criteria.sources: User reviews, performance benchmarks, developer documentation.

criteria.name: Output Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the final images or videos produced by the app, considering factors like resolution, clarity, and artifact presence.
criteria.sources: User reviews, sample outputs, expert analyses.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The pricing model of the app, including any one-time fees, subscriptions, or in-app purchases required to access AI features.
criteria.sources: App store listings, developer websites, user reviews.
